sqlMap.select: /*DialogTeMngVeri.selectTeMngVeriList*/ SELECT DECODE(A.CL_CD, 'RP002', '조서', '집계') AS FG_NM , (SELECT Z.DETL_CD_NM FROM TB_COMMCDDETL Z WHERE Z.CL_CD = SUBSTR(A.CL_CD, 1, 2) || '001' AND Z.DETL_CD = A.GROUP_ID AND ROWNUM = 1) AS CL_CD_NM , A.DETL_CD_NM AS DETL_CD_NM , A.CL_CD AS VERI_CL_CD , A.DETL_CD AS VERI_DETL_CD , NVL((SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(1) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM TB_DGRTEMNGMOKVERI Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND Z.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND Z.TE_MNG_MOK_CD = #teMngMokCd# AND Z.VERI_FG = #veriFg# AND Z.VERI_CL_CD = A.CL_CD AND Z.VERI_DETL_CD = A.DETL_CD ) , 'N') AS SEL_YN FROM TB_COMMCDDETL A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CL_CD IN ('RP002', 'RT002') AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.CL_CD, A.LINE_UP_ORD
sqlMap.delete: /*DialogTeMngVeri.deleteTeMngVeri*/ DELETE FROM TB_DGRTEMNGMOKVERI WHERE 1 = 1 AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_MNG_MOK_CD = #teMngMokCd# AND VERI_FG = #veriFg#
sqlMap.insert: /*DialogTeMngVeri.insertTeMngVeri*/ INSERT INTO TB_DGRTEMNGMOKVERI ( FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_MNG_MOK_CD , VERI_FG , VERI_CL_CD , VERI_DETL_CD , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE , MODI_ID , MODI_DATE ) VALUES ( #fisYear# , #bgtDgr# , #teMngMokCd# , #veriFg# , #veriClCd# , #veriDetlCd# , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP )
